OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (Dept. 514 heard in Room 504B)

Appearances on WEDNESDAY-AUG-31-2011: David Wasserman, counsel for plaintiff;
Julie Anderson, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff;
Morris W. Hirsch, limited scope attorney appearing for and with defendant Penny Lopes

Settlement conference is held. Case is settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the court this day. The September 6, 2011 trial is vacated.
